/-- Parity function on Boolean vectors: the function is 1 if the number of 1s is odd, 0 otherwise. -/
def parity (n : ℕ) (xs : Fin n → Bool) : Bool :=
  (Finset.univ.sum (fun i => if xs i then 1 else 0) % 2 = 1)
